name: Hirshabelle (Somalia)

colors.symbolism: the hoist triangle depicting the land

description: A light blue field with a green triangle at the hoist depicting two trees and a river, and a large white five-pointed star toward the fly.
history: Hirshabelle is a federal member state in central-southern Somalia, formed in October 2016 from the Hiiraan and Middle Shabelle regions; its capital is Jowhar.

features.role: green hoist triangle with trees and a river
